blurb: Season 1 arena gear for Subtlety Rogue: the Gladiator's set (Gladiator's Leather Spaulders, Gladiator's Leather Tunic, Gladiator's Leather Gloves…). Season 1 has no rating requirements — every piece is purchasable with points alone, which is why it remains the catch-up set all expansion. The slot-by-slot list below translates what the current arena ladder's top Subtlety Rogues equip into their Season 1 equivalents — same slot logic, this season's items.

bis.name: Veteran's Leather Bracers
bis.pveFlexNote: Honor offset from a later patch — in early Season 1 use dungeon/craft pieces until it unlocks.

faq.question: What is the Season 1 arena set for Subtlety Rogue?
faq.answer: The Gladiator's pieces: Gladiator's Leather Spaulders, Gladiator's Leather Tunic, Gladiator's Leather Gloves, Gladiator's Leather Legguards, Gladiator's Quickblade, Gladiator's War Edge. The 2-piece and 4-piece set bonuses carry over between seasons, so partial upgrades never break your bonus.

faq.question: What are the rating requirements in Season 1?
faq.answer: Season 1 has no rating requirements — every piece is purchasable with points alone, which is why it remains the catch-up set all expansion.

faq.question: How many arena points does full Season 1 gear cost?
faq.answer: The five set pieces total roughly 8,250 arena points (helm/chest/legs 1,875 each, shoulders 1,500, gloves 1,125) plus about 3,750 for a main weapon. Use the arena points calculator to turn your weekly rating into a purchase timeline.
